title: How do I connect to NUwave on Windows?
plain_text: NUwave is Northeastern University's secure wireless network. It is available on the Boston Northeastern campus in academic and administrative buildings, the library, and Northeastern-owned residence halls. Connect to NUwave on Windows Note: The following steps are for Windows 10. 1. From your desktop, select the Wi-Fi symbol on your taskbar. The list of available networks will open. 2. Select NUwave from the list and choose Connect. 3. Sign in using your Northeastern username and password and select OK. 4. If an additional pop-up asks you to accept a certificate or connect to the network, select Connect. 5. You are now connected to NUwave. Check your connection by browsing any website. Note: After the initial connection, you will be able to connect automatically once your computer detects the NUwave network.
body_html:
NUwave is Northeastern University's secure wireless network. It is available on the Boston Northeastern campus in academic and administrative buildings, the library, and Northeastern-owned residence halls.

Connect to NUwave on Windows

Note: The following steps are for Windows 10.

  • From your desktop, select the Wi-Fi symbol on your taskbar. The list of available networks will open.
  • Select NUwave from the list and choose Connect.
  • Sign in using your Northeastern username and password and select OK.
  • If an additional pop-up asks you to accept a certificate or connect to the network, select Connect.
  • You are now connected to NUwave. Check your connection by browsing any website.

Note: After the initial connection, you will be able to connect automatically once your computer detects the NUwave network.

Back to top

steps: From your desktop, select the Wi-Fi symbol on your taskbar. The list of available networks will open.
Select NUwave from the list and choose Connect.
Sign in using your Northeastern username and password and select OK.
If an additional pop-up asks you to accept a certificate or connect to the network, select Connect.
You are now connected to NUwave. Check your connection by browsing any website.
